title: 3 Cheap Stocks to Buy Today
text: Despite the big rally this November, there are still plenty of stocks that are undervalued, with many securities looking downright cheap at current levels. While the upturn in equities is starting to broaden out beyond technology, there are still many areas of the market that have yet to be lifted by the rising tide.

title: HP Inc. (HPQ) UBS Global Technology Conference - (Transcript)
text: HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ ) UBS Global Technology Conference Call November 29, 2023 11:35 AM ET Company Participants Marie Myers - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants David Vogt - UBS David Vogt Good morning, everyone. I think we're going to get started.

title: HP Inc.: Cheap And Improving
text: HP Inc. experienced stagnation over the past year due to excessive spending on buybacks and a deal for Poly in 2022, leading to increased debt. Despite a decline in sales, margins improved, and the company expects revenue growth to return in the near future, while debt has come down in 2023. HP's stock price has fluctuated but remains cheap, and the company has made efforts to reduce debt and improve cash flow.

title: Where Will HP Stock Be in 1 Year?
text: HP posted a mixed Q4 report. Its PC and printing revenues are still declining year over year, but both segments grew sequentially.

title: 3 Resilient Stocks with Massive Potential to Boost Your Wealth
text: Although the stock market whipsawed investors over the past few years, it showed its resilience by bouncing sharply higher after the pandemic collapse. As it has for more than a century, every double-digit decline by stocks is followed by a bull market.

title: 2024's Wealth Doublers: 3 Undervalued Growth Stocks to Grab Now
text: Markets are rallying, but not all stocks are sharing in the gains. Several well known securities are struggling right now.

title: HP vs. Dell: Which Brand is Better (Laptops, Pricing, and More)
text: If you're in the market for a new desktop computer or laptop, chances are HP (NYSE: HPQ) and Dell (NYSE: DELL) will have options close to the top of your list.

title: $84 Billion of Warren Buffett's Portfolio Is Invested in These 10 Dirt-Cheap Stocks
text: Buffett's attractively valued holdings include two bank stocks, two oil stocks, five Japanese stocks, and a tech stock. The legendary investor has recently reduced Berkshire Hathaway's stakes in a couple of these stocks.

title: HP (HPQ) Q4 Sales Hurt by Soft Demand for Personal Computers
text: Though the quarterly top-line performance continues to be battered by soft PC demand, HP (HPQ) is optimistic about the market recovery, beginning next year, driven by customers shifting to AI PCs.

title: HP Shares Reverse Course Amid AI Optimism After Reporting Sales Declined
text: The slowdown in demand for PCs following the pandemic-induced boom negatively impacted HP's (HPQ) latest results, but the company suggested it anticipates artificial intelligence (AI) machines could be a key driver of growth beginning next year.

title: HP (HPQ) Q4 Earnings Beat, Stock Falls on Dim Q1 Forecast
text: Though soft demand hurts HP's (HPQ) Q4 top line, efficient cost management, and lower commodity and logistics expenses aid the bottom line.

title: HP Inc. (HPQ) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 21, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Orit Keinan-Nahon - Head of Investor Relations Enrique Lores - President and Chief Executive Officer Marie Myers - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Amit Daryani - Evercore ISI Krish Sankar - TD Cowen Toni Sacconaghi - Bernstein Asiya Merchant - Citigroup Erik Woodring - Morgan Stanley Mike Ng - Goldman Sachs Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Fourth Quarter 2023 HP Incorporated Earnings Conference Call. title: Compared to Estimates, HP (HPQ) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for HP (HPQ) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended October 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: HP CEO says AI capabilities will 'double the growth of the PC category'
text: HP Inc CEO Enrique Lores discussed how new computers with AI capabilities will help grow the PC market in an interview with CNBC's Jim Cramer.

title: Warren Buffett's 5 Dividend Buys For November
text: This Warren Buffett holdings list from Kiplinger first-appeared 11/14/23 on the Berkshire Hathaway SEC Form-13F. Kiplinger, YCharts, and Dogs-of-The-Dow all track this batch. Here is your update from 11/17/23 YCharts data. 27 of 45 current Berkshire-owned-stocks pay dividends. As of 11/17/23 the top-ten ranged 2.7%-4.73% by annual-yield and 39 of 45 ranged 2.18% to 63.69% by broker-estimated target-price-upsides. Analyst-augured top-ten net-gains from Buffett's November dividend dogs ranged 14.16%-28.61% from KO, ALLY, C, OXY, DEO, KHC, TMUS, JEF, KR, and top pick CVX per YCharts data.

title: HP shares slide on underwhelming guidance; AI PC launch coming in the second half of 2024
text: HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) shares dropped more than 3% after hours Tuesday as the company's fiscal first-quarter guidance underwhelmed investors The company guided for fiscal first quarter adjusted earnings of $0.76 to $0.86 per share, the midpoint of which is below the analyst consensus of $0.86 per share. The PC company maintained its full-year adjusted earnings projection range of $3.25 to $3.65 per share.

title: HP's stock falls despite solid results, vow to ship AI PCs in second half of 2024
text: HP Inc.'s stock initially dipped more than 3% in extended trading Tuesday after the computing giant reported generally solid results and vowed to introduce its first AI-powered PCs in the second half of 2024.

title: HP expected to report year-over-year increase in profits for 4Q
text: HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) is expected to report higher profits but lower revenues when it hands down its fourth quarter earnings report after the closing bell in New York on Tuesday, November 21. For the quarter ended October 31, 2023, the IT company that sells hardware and software expects to report adjusted earnings per share (EPS) in the range of $0.85 to $0.97, compared to adjusted EPS of $0.85 in the year-ago quarter.

title: HP Inc. (HPQ) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: The weak demand for PCs and high inventory levels are likely to have hurt HP Inc.'s (HPQ) Q4 top line, while favorable pricing and disciplined cost management may have aided the bottom line.

title: Buffett's latest portfolio additions, trims, and cuts in Q3
text: Warren Buffett is widely regarded as the most well-known, famous, and successful investor of all time. As such, his investment decisions and changes to his holdings are closely monitored and highly anticipated by the investing community.

title: 3 value stocks you shouldn't let go of this quarter
text: The world of financial markets can be a brutal jungle, filled with dangers at every turn and businesses going bankrupt or turning billionaires almost overnight. Today, some of these risks and uncertain turning points have been assessed to bring you a sensible list of companies that can be termed as value stocks.

title: Here's Warren Buffett's stock portfolio changes
text: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA, BRKB) announced to the Security and Exchange Commission (SEC) its Q3 re port on Tuesday, November 14, which tells an interesting story of new acquisitions, reductions, and exits from holdings.

title: Nike, Merck Among 13 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In Second Half Of November
text: Investors were rewarded with 10%+ dividend increases from Snap-on Tools and ADP in the first half of November. Other companies that rewarded investors in the first two weeks of the month were Emerson, which extended its dividend growth streak to 67 years, and utilities Atmos and Evergy. The second half of the month will bring dividend increases from Nike, Merck, Hormel and Agilent, among others.

title: HP Inc. Declares Dividend
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Nov. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) has declared a cash dividend of $0.2756 per share on the company's common stock, representing an increase of approximately 5% from the prior dividend.

title: Why Warren Buffett has done more to educate investors than any other corporate executive
text: Warren Buffett, the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, is world famous and a closely watched market force. Berkshire is a big shareholder of Apple, one of the seven big tech companies that currently dominate the U.S. stock market.

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks With Share Buyback Programs
text: It's no surprise that there are many blue-chip stocks with share buyback programs. Alongside the paying out of dividends, share buybacks are a great vehicle for mature businesses to maximize value for investors.

title: HP Highlights Advancements in Polymers and Metals 3D Printing at Formnext 2023
text: HP's Formnext announcement highlights new innovations, sustainable materials, and software capabilities along with key partner and customer momentum

title: HP Partners with INDO-MIM to Advance Metal Additive Manufacturing
text: FRANKFURT, Germany, Nov. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today at Formnext, the world's leading additive manufacturing event, HP Inc. (Booth D41, Hall 12.1) announced a strategic partnership with INDO-MIM (Indo-MIM Private Limited), one of the world largest players in the Metal Injection Molding (MIM) industry and an emerging player in the additive manufacturing powder industry. This collaboration marks a significant step toward advancing metal additive manufacturing technology and expanding its applications in various industries.

title: 2 Stocks Warren Buffett Is Selling and the 1 Surprising Stock He Can't Stop Buying
text: There's a reason investors pay close attention to Warren Buffett -- he's overseen a nearly 4,200,000% aggregate return for his company's Class A shares (BRK.A) spanning nearly 60 years. Quarterly 13F filings offer investors a snapshot of what the smartest investors on Wall Street have been buying and selling.
